design_philosophy: The 'Living Ledger'. A data-rich scrolling experience that feels less like a corporate dashboard and more like an editorial piece on nature and growth. Merging authoritative typography (Financial Times style) with organic, earthy colors and high-end environmental photography. Data must be allowed to breathe within vast negative space.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
scales.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium
scales.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold

rules.editorial_hierarchy: Headings must use Cormorant Garamond. Data numbers and body text must use Manrope. Avoid bolding headings unnecessarily; rely on scale and font-family contrast.

layout_modes.data_row: flex flex-col md:flex-row items-baseline justify-between py-6 border-b border-[#E3DFD3]

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E382B] text-[#F4F1EB] hover:bg-[#15281F] transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1E382B] text-[#1E382B] hover:bg-[#1E382B] hover:text-[#F4F1EB] transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm uppercase tracking-widest

cards.default: bg-[#FCFBF8] border border-[#E3DFD3] rounded-none hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

tabs.trigger: px-8 py-4 text-lg font-medium text-[#8A948D] data-[state=active]:text-[#1E382B] data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-[#1E382B] transition-all bg-transparent rounded-none

charts.tooltip: bg-[#FCFBF8] border border-[#E3DFD3] p-4 shadow-sm text-sm font-body text-[#1E382B] rounded-none

images.description: Aerial view of a road surrounded by palm trees with a dramatic sunset, used for the main Hero background with a dark overlay.
Lush green rice terraces, used as an atmospheric image in the Food Crops (Agriculture Stats) section.
Shallow focus of an Indonesian farmer, used in the Smallholder Plantation Stats section.

sections_and_data_mapping.title: Kekayaan Agraria Mukomuko
sections_and_data_mapping.subtitle: Sebuah narasi data tentang pertumbuhan, lahan, dan masa depan pertanian di Kabupaten Mukomuko, Provinsi Bengkulu.

sections_and_data_mapping.title: Sebaran Lahan LP2B
sections_and_data_mapping.subtitle: Lahan Pertanian Pangan Berkelanjutan (Total 4.675,170 Ha di 15 Kecamatan)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images uses proper overlays or text-shadows to meet APCA contrast requirements.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, tabs, filters, and major data points MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='tab-2024', data-testid='chart-tbs-price').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, recharts, react-countup, lenis (or @studio-freight/lenis), and @fontsource/cormorant-garamond, @fontsource/manrope.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or generic fonts for headings. Stick strictly to Cormorant Garamond for headings and Manrope for data/body.
Implement the layout with pure HTML/Tailwind using pure grid and flexbox for layout, relying on immense spacing (py-32, gap-12).
Use Shadcn UI primarily for the Tabs (2024 vs 2025 comparison) and Select/Dropdowns. The rest should be bespoke editorial designs.
Ensure all numbers animate on scroll using react-countup.
Do not use dark mode. Stick to the 'Light' Earthy theme defined in the colors object.
Build the application completely frontend-only with static data extracted from this JSON structure.
Use the exact image URLs provided in the assets section. DO NOT use placeholder images.
